query: CIA Director John Ratcliffe visit to Cuba May 2026 details and any follow-up visits by US cabinet officials planned
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key findings:

**Ratcliffe's May 2026 Cuba Visit:** CIA Director John Ratcliffe traveled to Havana on **May 14, 2026** (confirmed publicly May 15) — one of the highest-level US-Cuba engagements in decades. He met with **Raulito Rodríguez Castro** (Raúl Castro's grandson), **Interior Minister Lázaro Álvarez Casas**, and Cuba's **intelligence chief**, delivering Trump's message that the US would expand economic/security engagement **only if Cuba "makes fundamental changes."** The US offered **$100 million** in humanitarian aid plus satellite internet, conditional on Cuban acceptance. The visit came amid Cuba's power-grid collapse and fuel exhaustion under a US energy blockade.

**Follow-up cabinet visits:** No specific follow-up cabinet-level visit was announced as a direct result of the Ratcliffe trip. However, the visit was part of a broader escalating sequence:
- **April 2026:** State Department envoys sent by **Secretary of State Marco Rubio** visited Cuba
- **May 7:** Rubio announced new sanctions
- **SOUTHCOM's Gen. Donovan** met Cuban military commanders re: Guantánamo
- By **June 2026**, analysts described a shift to an overt pressure campaign, with **Rubio positioned as the central cabinet figure** on Cuba policy

The pattern shows recurring high-level US missions rather than a single announced follow-up. Some sources (Foreign Policy, CNN, Axios) were paywalled/geo-blocked and couldn't be fully retrieved. Full report and structured data have been submitted.
